title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Hiranandani Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Hiranandani Group
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!
